---
title: "Volt Typhoon Analysis"
---

## Overview

This website presents an overview of Volt Typhoon activity, mapped to MITRE ATT&CK tactics, detection sources, and mitigations.

## Activity Timeline

This timeline shows how observed activity develops over time.

<iframe src="figures/volt_typhoon_activity_timeline.html" width="100%" height="650"></iframe>

## Detection Sources

This figure shows which data sources are most useful for detecting Volt Typhoon behavior.

<iframe src="figures/volt_typhoon_detection_sources.html" width="100%" height="650"></iframe>

## Mitigation Coverage

This chart shows which ATT&CK techniques have stronger or weaker mitigation coverage.

<iframe src="figures/volt_typhoon_mitigation_coverage.html" width="100%" height="650"></iframe>

## Tactic Coverage Heatmap

This heatmap shows how Volt Typhoon techniques are distributed across tactics.

<iframe src="figures/volt_typhoon_tactic_coverage_heatmap.html" width="100%" height="650"></iframe>
